parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely composed of AI-generated images, evident from the surreal, melting ice cream cone faces of the characters. The animation consists of static images with slight panning or zooming, lacking natural movement.

characters.appearance: Woman with a face resembling a melting vanilla ice cream cone, retaining human eyes and mouth. Wears a blue sari with a red border.
characters.wardrobe: Blue sari with a red border, traditional Indian jewelry.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from sad and defeated to confident and happy.

characters.appearance: Man with a face resembling a yellow/orange ice cream cone.
Woman with a face resembling a green/pink ice cream cone.
Man with a face resembling a brown ice cream cone.
Older woman with a stylized, slightly textured face, grey hair.
characters.wardrobe: Grey business suit with a patterned scarf.

scenes.setting: Various domestic settings, courtroom, park. Warm, slightly muted colors.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is shown in various distressing situations. She cries in a courtroom setting, sits sadly on a balcony, and is yelled at by Character B in a living room. She is also seen cooking in a rustic kitchen and sitting sadly while Character B is with another woman in a park.

scenes.visual_description: A montage of AI-generated images depicting Character A's past struggles, including her divorce and domestic life, establishing her initial unhappy state.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: मेरा डिवोर्स हो गया था। ना ससुराल में जगह मिल रही थी और ना ही मायके में। क्योंकि मेरी लव मैरिज टूटी थी। [I got divorced. I couldn't find a place in my in-laws' house nor in my parents' house. Because my love marriage broke.]
Character A says: मेरा नाम अंजलि है। शादी 8 साल पहले हुई थी। लव मैरिज थी। पति कहता था तुम घर संभालो मैं ऑफिस संभालूंगा। मैंने मान लिया। जॉब छोड़ दी। [My name is Anjali. I got married 8 years ago. It was a love marriage. My husband used to say, you take care of the house, I will take care of the office. I agreed. I left my job.]
Character A says: घर देखा, खाना बनाया, फैमिली संभाली। पर धीरे-धीरे रिस्पेक्ट ही खत्म हो गई। ताने मिलते थे, करती क्या हो पूरा दिन खाना बनाने के अलावा। [I took care of the house, cooked food, took care of the family. But slowly the respect ended. I used to get taunts, what do you do all day apart from cooking.]
Character A says: 8 साल बाद पति ने दूसरी शादी कर ली। सीधे मुंह पे बोला डिवोर्स चाहिए तुम निकल जाओ। [After 8 years, my husband married someone else. He said straight to my face, I want a divorce, you get out.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands sadly in a living room while Character C and Character D look at her disapprovingly. She is then seen in a kitchen with Character C. Later, she sits in an office reception area, looking sad and holding a piece of paper, while other stylized characters are in the background.

scenes.visual_description: Images showing Character A facing rejection from her family and struggling to find a job due to her lack of skills and English proficiency.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: मायके आ गई। भाई-भाभी के चेहरे पे साफ दिख रहा था, वेलकम नहीं है। भाभी कहती थीं अपने पैरों पर खड़ी हो जाओ। पर कैसे? [I came to my parents' house. It was clear on my brother and sister-in-law's faces, I am not welcome. My sister-in-law used to say, stand on your own feet. But how?]
Character A says: 8 साल का गैप। कोई स्किल नहीं, कोई एक्सपीरियंस नहीं। रेज़्यूमे में क्या लिखूंगी? और सबसे बड़ी प्रॉब्लम, इंग्लिश जीरो। [A gap of 8 years. No skill, no experience. What will I write in my resume? And the biggest problem, English is zero.]
Character A says: जॉब के लिए इंटरव्यू देना है पर एचआर इंग्लिश में बात करती है। रिसेप्शनिस्ट की पोस्ट के लिए भी पूछते हैं, इंग्लिश आती है? मैं चुप। [I have to give an interview for a job but the HR talks in English. Even for the post of a receptionist, they ask, do you know English? I am quiet.]
Character A says: 32 की उम्र में फ्रेशर कौन लेता है? और बिना इंग्लिश के तो कोई पूछता भी नहीं। [Who hires a fresher at the age of 32? And without English, no one even asks.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is shown in various settings, primarily looking at a smartphone. She is in bed at night, sitting on a balcony during the day, sitting in a living room, and standing in a kitchen. Her expression changes from sad to more engaged and eventually smiling as she interacts with the phone.

scenes.visual_description: A sequence showing Character A discovering an app on her phone and using it to learn English in various locations around her home, gradually gaining confidence.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: रात को सोती नहीं थी। सोचती थी कि क्या होगा। एक रात फोन पर रील देख रही थी। इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप का ऐड आया। [I couldn't sleep at night. I used to think what will happen. One night I was watching a reel on my phone. An ad for the English Seekho app came.]
Character A says: एक लड़की बोल रही थी, एआई कोच से रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करो। कोई जज नहीं करती। वो लाइन रुक गई। कोई जज नहीं करती। [A girl was saying, practice daily with an AI coach. No one judges. That line stuck. No one judges.]
Character A says: मेरी पूरी जिंदगी जजमेंट से भरी थी। पति जज करता था, ससुराल जज करती थी, मायका जज करता था। एक ऐप है जो नहीं करेगी। डाउनलोड किया। [My whole life was full of judgment. My husband judged, my in-laws judged, my parents judged. There is an app that won't. I downloaded it.]
Character A says: एक रुपये का ट्रायल था। एक्सपर्ट के छोटे-छोटे वीडियो हैं। हिंदी में समझाते हैं। बिल्कुल बेसिक से। [There was a one-rupee trial. There are short videos of experts. They explain in Hindi. From the very basics.]
Character A says: माय नेम इज़ अंजलि। आई एम लुकिंग फॉर अ जॉब। आई हैव एक्सपीरियंस इन मैनेजिंग अ हाउसहोल्ड। वहीं से शुरू किया। [My name is Anjali. I am looking for a job. I have experience in managing a household. I started from there.]
Character A says: और एआई कोच है, 24 घंटे अवेलेबल। रात को भाई-भाभी सो जाते थे, मैं कमरे में चटाई पे बैठ के एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करती थी। [And there is an AI coach, available 24 hours. At night when my brother and sister-in-law used to sleep, I used to sit on a mat in my room and practice with the AI coach.]
Character A says: हाउ टू इंट्रोड्यूस योरसेल्फ इन एन इंटरव्यू। हाउ टू आंसर टेल मी अबाउट योरसेल्फ। हाउ टू स्पीक टू अ बॉस। हाउ टू टॉक ऑन फोन प्रोफेशनली। [How to introduce yourself in an interview. How to answer tell me about yourself. How to speak to a boss. How to talk on phone professionally.]
Character A says: गलत बोलती थी, सुधार देती थी। 500 बार सुधारा, कभी नहीं बोली तुम्हें इंग्लिश की क्या जरूरत है, तुम तो हाउसवाइफ हो। [I used to speak wrong, it used to correct me. It corrected me 500 times, never said why do you need English, you are a housewife.]
Character A says: एक महीने बाद कॉन्फिडेंस आया। बेसिक इंग्लिश बोल पाती थी, फ्लूएंट नहीं। पर समझ आती थी और जवाब दे पाती थी। [After a month, confidence came. I could speak basic English, not fluent. But I could understand and reply.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is on a balcony with Character D and Character C. Character D is laughing. Then, Character A sits across a desk from Character E in an office setting. Character A looks confident and is speaking. Later, they stand and shake hands in a modern office lobby.

scenes.visual_description: Character A faces mockery from her family but confidently attends a job interview, where she impresses the HR manager and gets hired.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: एक दिन भाई ने बोला, एक कॉल सेंटर है पास में, हिंदी वाली जॉब है। मैंने बोला, मुझे इंग्लिश वाली दिखाओ। भाई हंसे। भाभी ने आंख मारी। [One day my brother said, there is a call center nearby, it's a Hindi job. I said, show me the English one. My brother laughed. My sister-in-law winked.]
Character A says: इंटरव्यू गई। एचआर ने पूछा, टेल मी अबाउट योरसेल्फ। [I went for the interview. The HR asked, tell me about yourself.]
Character A says: मैंने बोला, माय नेम इज़ अंजलि। आई एम 32 इयर्स ओल्ड। आई वाज़ अ होममेकर फॉर 8 इयर्स। नाउ आई वांट टू रीस्टार्ट माय करियर। आई एम अ क्विक लर्नर एंड आई एम नॉट अफ्रेड ऑफ हार्ड वर्क। [I said, My name is Anjali. I am 32 years old. I was a homemaker for 8 years. Now I want to restart my career. I am a quick learner and I am not afraid of hard work.]
Character A says: एचआर मुस्कुराई। बोली, यू आर हायर्ड। ट्रेनिंग नेक्स्ट मंडे। स्टार्टिंग सैलरी 18 हज़ार रुपये। [The HR smiled. She said, You are hired. Training next Monday. Starting salary 18 thousand rupees.]

scenes.setting: Living room, office, bedroom, street, bank, school.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A works on her phone at home, then shakes hands again with Character E in the office. She counts money in a bedroom, walks confidently on a street, fills out a form in a bank, and talks to a teacher in a school hallway. She looks happy and self-assured.

scenes.visual_description: A montage showing Character A's successful new life, including working, getting promoted, managing her finances, and confidently handling daily tasks in English.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: घर से काम। इंग्लिश में कस्टमर्स से बात करना। तीन महीने बाद परफॉरमेंस रिव्यु हुआ। [Work from home. Talking to customers in English. After three months, there was a performance review.]
Character A says: मैनेजर ने बोला, अंजलि योर इंग्लिश हैज़ इम्प्रूव्ड अ लॉट। वी आर प्रमोटिंग यू। सैलरी 25 हज़ार रुपये। [The manager said, Anjali your English has improved a lot. We are promoting you. Salary 25 thousand rupees.]
Character A says: अपना पीजी ले लिया। रेंट 6 हज़ार रुपये। खर्चा 5 हज़ार रुपये। पापा को 5 हज़ार रुपये भेजती हूं। हर महीने 8 हज़ार रुपये सेव करती हूं। [I took my own PG. Rent 6 thousand rupees. Expenses 5 thousand rupees. I send 5 thousand rupees to my father. I save 8 thousand rupees every month.]
Character A says: 6 महीने हो गए। 25 हज़ार रुपये कमाती हूं। अपने दम पर। किसी पर बोझ नहीं हूं। [It's been 6 months. I earn 25 thousand rupees. On my own. I am not a burden on anyone.]
Character A says: बैंक में खुद जाती हूं, इंग्लिश में फॉर्म भरती हूं। बेटे की स्कूल में टीचर से इंग्लिश में बात करती हूं। अपने डिसीजन खुद लेती हूं। [I go to the bank myself, fill the form in English. I talk to the teacher in English at my son's school. I take my own decisions.]
Character A says: भाभी अब फोन करती है, वो ऐप का नाम बताना। ससुराल वाले पूछते हैं, अंजलि को इतनी अच्छी जॉब कैसे मिली? [My sister-in-law calls now, tell me the name of that app. In-laws ask, how did Anjali get such a good job?]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A laughs with Character B and other in-laws, looks thoughtful in a kitchen, then cries while holding a piece of cloth. She reads a book in a library and finally sits confidently in an office setting across from Character E.

scenes.visual_description: Character A reflects on her journey from being mocked to becoming independent, delivering a final motivational message to the audience.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 32 की उम्र में फिर से खड़ी हुई। पर इस बार मजबूत खड़ी हूं। किसी के सहारे नहीं, अपने दम पर। [I stood up again at the age of 32. But this time I am standing strong. Not with anyone's support, on my own.]
Character A says: अगर तुम भी हर जगह चुप खड़ी रहती हो, इंटरव्यू में, ऑफिस में, फोन पे, तो इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [If you also stand quietly everywhere, in an interview, in the office, on the phone, then download the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: एक्सपर्ट के वीडियो देखो, एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करो। एक रुपये का ट्रायल है, एक रील से भी सस्ता। [Watch expert videos, practice with the AI coach. There is a one-rupee trial, cheaper than a reel.]
Character A says: एक महीने में कॉन्फिडेंस आ जाएगा। जब एचआर के सामने कॉन्फिडेंटली बोलोगी, माय नेम इज़ अंजलि, तब समझ आएगा असली फर्क। [Confidence will come in a month. When you confidently say in front of the HR, My name is Anjali, then you will understand the real difference.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed against a solid light purple background. The scene then cuts to a solid black background.

scenes.visual_description: An end card showing the app on a phone with a call to action, followed by a disclaimer screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इनस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
English Seekho INSTALL NOW
English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain. (English Seekho is not endorsed, sponsored, affiliated or associated with any government authority institution brand, organisation or individual. Use of any names trademarks logos or references is for educational and informational purposes only Some content may be dramatised or representational just for understanding English Seekho does not promise any guaranteed results Outcomes depend on individual effort and other factors and may vary.)
